dialog.content: Before your trip, it's recommended to install the official mobile app **Coral Travel**, available in both **App Store** and **Google Play**. This will help you track the status of your tour and stay updated on any changes or important information related to your travel arrangements.
Кто указан как принимающая сторона в Турции?

In Turkey, the receiving party for your visit is typically specified as **"Tour Operator"** or **"Hotel Management Company"**, depending on the type of accommodation and tour package you're using. For instance, if you've booked through a travel agency, the details might list the local partner company responsible for handling your stay and itinerary. Make sure to check your booking confirmation or contact your travel agent for precise information regarding the exact entity acting as the receiver during your stay.
Кто указан как принимающая сторона в Турции?
The receiving party in Turkey is listed as **ODEON TOURS**.
